/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/HorizonEngine.dir/engine/src/main.cpp.o -o HorizonEngine  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib scripting/libHorizonScripting.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL3.0.dylib libHorizonCore.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit _deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a -framework OpenGL -framework AudioToolbox -framework AudioUnit -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreFoundation _deps/luau-build/libLuau.Compiler.a _deps/luau-build/libLuau.Ast.a _deps/luau-build/libLuau.Bytecode.a _deps/luau-build/libLuau.VM.a _deps/luau-build/libLuau.Common.a
